Let's fix that.

story.headline_html:
Three decades of builds.
Almost none of it documented.
story.lead: Brian, thanks for reaching out. I had a look at Kombi's site and your work clearly speaks for itself, your clients rave about you. But here's the disconnect: 31 years of custom homes, renovations, and complex builds on the North Shore, and your entire online presence is a homepage and a contact page.
paragraphs: Your site has 2 pages total. No project portfolio. No case studies. No Google Business Profile. No schema markup telling Google you're a North Vancouver builder. The carousel on the homepage shows beautiful work, but there's no way for a potential client searching "custom home builder North Vancouver" to find it.

Meanwhile, Blackfish Homes has a full portfolio with detailed project pages. Bolder Homes showcases every build with professional photography. Goldcon has case studies, awards, and a content library. These firms aren't building better homes than Kombi. They're documenting them.
This proposal puts a content partner behind Kombi who documents every project, builds your portfolio month by month, and closes the gap between the quality of your work and how visible it is online.

audit.headline_html:
What the data says.
Verified, not estimated.
audit.lead: I crawled kombihomes.com. Here's what I found across 2 pages.

findings: SEO fundamentals score 85/100. Valid SSL, good meta title, meta description present, canonical tags, Open Graph. The technical foundation is solid.
Visual assets score 92/100. 12 quality images on the homepage carousel. The photography shows real craftsmanship. Almost all images have proper alt text.
Houzz listing active. Directory presence established for design-build in North Vancouver.
Fast server response (541ms). Clean, lightweight site. No performance issues.

Only 2 pages on the entire site. A homepage and a contact page. 31 years of custom homes, renovations, and complex builds with zero project pages to show for it. Every project page is a new search entry point you're missing.
160 words of content total. Google ranks pages based on content depth. Your competitors have thousands of words across dozens of pages. Kombi has a paragraph.
No project portfolio at all. The homepage carousel shows the work but there's nowhere for a potential client to explore individual projects, read about scope, or see before-and-after transformations.
No Google Business Profile detected. Can't appear in Google Maps or the Local Pack for "general contractor North Vancouver" searches. This is the highest-impact gap.
No structured data. Zero schema markup. Google doesn't know Kombi is a builder, where you're based, what services you offer, or your 31-year track record.
No blog, no case studies, no testimonials on site. Your BBB reviews are excellent. Ryan Heathfield gets called out by name for quality. None of this social proof lives on your own site.
Zero award submissions. HAVAN and Georgie awards are available for North Shore builders. Kombi's work qualifies. The photography to submit doesn't exist yet.

insight.title: The Bottom Line
insight.content_html: Kombi has strong technical SEO fundamentals and genuine craftsmanship visible even in a homepage carousel. But the site is 2 pages with 160 words. No portfolio, no project pages, no blog, no awards. The fix isn't a redesign, it's a content partner who photographs every project, builds the portfolio page by page, fixes the local SEO gaps in month one, and turns a 2-page site into a 15+ page portfolio that actually generates leads.

services.intro: Photography, video, and build documentation for every project. Every shoot becomes a portfolio page with proper SEO. Your site grows with the business, and every page works for you around the clock.

insight.title: How to Think About This
insight.content_html: A single project shoot typically runs $3,000 to $4,500 as a one-off. Here's what a monthly partnership looks like instead:

breakdowns.label: Foundation $2,500
breakdowns.desc: Photography + build docs + a new project page per shoot + GBP setup and schema fixes. Your site grows every month.

breakdowns.label: Growth $3,000
breakdowns.desc: Everything above plus social reels, monthly blog post, strategy calls, and a year-end film. Content engine running.

breakdowns.label: Creative Partner $3,500
breakdowns.desc: Content + strategy. Documentary film, HAVAN/Georgie awards pipeline, and full social management. The complete package.

insight.footer_html: A one-off shoot gives you images. A content partner gives you a growing portfolio, search visibility, award credentials, and a consistent brand presence. After 31 years of building, the documentation should match the quality of the work.

roadmap.intro: The pilot runs three months. Three projects documented. You'll know within 90 days whether this model works for Kombi.

entries: Google Business Profile created, verified, and optimized with photos
LocalBusiness schema markup added to the site
NAP consistency audit across Houzz, BBB, and all directory listings
Full-day shoot at a recently completed custom home or renovation
20 to 25 edited images: exteriors, interiors, detail shots, drone aerials
Before/during/after documentation if renovation
First project page built and published on the site
Social media reel: project reveal or before/after transformation
Full-day session at a second project
20 to 25 edited images + build documentation
Crew action shots and craft detail photography
Second project page built and published
Social media reel from shoot content
Strategy call: review month one, adjust approach
Full-day session, third project
20 to 25 edited images + build documentation
Third project page published
Social media reel + LinkedIn content
Pilot review: what worked, what the data says, what comes next
If results proven: 12-month continuation locked in

vision.headline_html:
What a full year of
content looks like.
vision.intro: The pilot proves the model. A full year gives Kombi the strongest visual portfolio of any general contractor on the North Shore.

quarters.title: Prove the Model
quarters.description: 3 shoots. 75 images. Google Business Profile live and optimized. 3 project pages where there were zero. Your site goes from a business card to a portfolio.

quarters.title: Build the Library
quarters.description: 150+ images. 6 project pages. Renovation transformation sequences, custom home documentation, drone aerials. Six months of content compounding.

quarters.title: Leverage
quarters.description: HAVAN and Georgie Award submissions from the best projects. Year-in-review content for proposals. 225+ images. Kombi's online presence is unrecognizable from where it started.

quarters.title: Separate
quarters.description: 300+ images, a year-end documentary, and a complete project portfolio working for Kombi 24/7. The North Shore builders who invest in content now win the next cycle.

awards.lead: Blackfish Homes, Bolder Homes, and Goldcon all showcase awards and professional portfolios. After 31 years, Kombi has built homes that are every bit as good. The credentials don't reflect it yet.
paragraphs: In the custom home and renovation market, awards are trust signals that close contracts. HAVAN and Georgie submissions are straightforward once you have the photography. Every project we shoot is captured to award-submission spec from day one.

competitor_numbers.label: Years of Builds to Draw From

awards.detail_html:
What I Handle

Every shoot is photographed to award-submission spec from day one. 300 DPI JPEG, colour-calibrated, anonymous-ready. When HAVAN and Georgie submission season opens, your images are done. I prepare the entry materials, identify the right categories, and manage the process.

services.title: Award Submissions
entries: HAVAN Awards (Homebuilders Association Vancouver)
Georgie Awards (CHBA BC)
CHBA National Awards for Housing Excellence
Gold Nugget Awards
Renovation-specific categories

services.title: Publication Pitches
entries: Western Living
Dwell
Mountain Life
ArchDaily
NUVO Magazine

insight.title: Renovation Categories Are Wide Open
insight.content_html: HAVAN and Georgie awards have specific renovation categories: Whole House, Kitchen, Bathroom, Best Exterior, and more. Kombi's renovation and custom home work qualifies across multiple categories. One project, properly photographed, can generate 3 to 5 submissions. The firms who submit first establish the credibility gap.

next_steps.headline_html:
No rush.
When you're ready, here's how it works.
paragraphs: Brian, you mentioned you'll need photography down the road. This proposal is here whenever that time comes. Whether it's a single project shoot or an ongoing partnership, the door's open.

The pilot is three months. If it works, we keep going. If it doesn't, you walk away with 75 professional images, three new project pages, a Google Business Profile, and content that's stronger than anything your competitors are putting out. There's no downside to trying it.

steps.title: Pick Your Tier

steps.title: Deposit
